name: Senolytics review-landscape coverage-gap repair
summary: Updates the senolytics coverage assessment and records a blocked no-op search/screening trail to keep the recent systematic-review/meta-analysis landscape gap explicit after a bounded extraction-refresh pass could not add a source-snapshot-backed review source. The repair is partial: no recent systematic review or meta-analysis was screened into the knowledge base because the job supplied no source row or context pack and PubMed snapshot retrieval was unavailable from the worker.

scope.question: Repair the senolytics review-landscape coverage gap by determining whether a recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source can be screened into the knowledge base.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded self-healing repair candidate and required review-lane contract.
Refreshes the review-landscape category and gap text to preserve the unresolved systematic-review/meta-analysis screening gap and record the source-row/snapshot blocker.
Records the bounded extraction-refresh session and blocked outcome for the review-landscape gap.
Records the attempted PubMed review-landscape query and the worker-network blocker.
Records that no search hits could be screened into the knowledge base during this bounded pass.

promotion.summary: Promoted to accepted after all required active review lanes passed.
